name: Cashu.me
short_description: Chaumian ecash wallet for Bitcoin with Lightning support
description: Cashu.me is a privacy-focused Chaumian ecash wallet for Bitcoin. As a PWA it supports multiple mints, seed backups, Nostr Wallet Connect for Lightning integration, and offline token transfers—offering strong privacy so transactions don't reveal identity or balances.
usecases: Send and receive ecash tokens with Bitcoin-backed privacy
Manage multiple mints from a single interface
Connect to Lightning Network via Nostr Wallet Connect
notes: Ecash is a bearer asset - backup your seed phrase
Uses browser localStorage for token storage
Connect to public mints or run your own mint (nutshell)
